title: Starlink prints billions. SpaceX burns it on AI

title: Finma Says Immediate Mythos Access Would Pose Systemic Bank Risk
description: Switzerland’s top financial regulator said giving banks quick and easy access to Anthropic PBC’s artificial intelligence tool Mythos would create a severe risk for the country’s financial system.
content:
Switzerland’s top financial regulator said giving banks quick and easy access to Anthropic PBC’s artificial intelligence tool Mythos would create a severe risk for the country’s financial system.

title: President of UNGA's 80th session to visit India on Apr 28
description: Annalena Baerbock, President of the 80th session of the UN General Assembly, will visit India on April 28. She will meet External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar to discuss key multilateral issues. Baerbock will also pay homage to Mahatma Gandhi at Rajghat. An interactive session on artificial intelligence governance and regulation with the Ministry of Electronics and IT is also planned.

title: At SpaceX, AI is burning the cash that Starlink earns
description: Elon Musk is touting SpaceX as humanity’s ticket to Mars. But the company’s pitch to investors for a potentially historic IPO reveals that its main business will be the same as Big Tech: building artificial intelligence.

title: Trump administration vows crackdown on Chinese companies 'exploiting' AI models made in US
description: America is taking a strong stance against foreign tech firms, especially those in China, for allegedly stealing advanced artificial intelligence capabilities. The US government plans to work with domestic AI companies to identify and counter these activities.

title: Advanced AI Raises Stakes in Cybersecurity Race
description: For years, concerns about artificial intelligence disrupting cybersecurity have largely been framed as long-term risks.
